flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Berklee College of Music fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (57.0% → 50.3%).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Berklee College of Music fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).
